insights.author: Aman Sharma (Senior)
insights.text: The OA had 2 coding questions. One was standard DP, another was a graph traversal problem. Time management is key.

insights.author: Priya Singh (Alumni)
insights.text: In the interview, they focus heavily on system design and core data structures. Know your basics.

qa.author: Rahul Verma
qa.question: Is this role open for ECE students?

replies.author: Placement Cell
replies.text: No, currently Google has restricted this drive to CSE and IT only.

insights.author: Karan Johar (Senior)
insights.text: Expect questions on OS and DBMS along with standard LeetCode mediums.
